name: Mike Thompson
subject: time to get things underway!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwEJqCJIiTBcj90YNKehv9cJ7ssQFEkJk__mQbluL9U=/FrFB2mtRRuVwsUTRrIqcYFSuOEP4WLtq0XD-N8zWHJw=?fn=Peter&ln=Willis&add1=&add2=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&pc=50023&ci=Ankeny&st=IA&hp=&oc=&ep=) Peter,

The new Democratic House majority has been sworn in, and I'm honored to be representing our community once again in Congress.

Democrats are ready to get the job done for the American people.

[**Our first order of business is getting the government back up and running. Will you join me in calling on the GOP to come to the negotiation table and reopen the government?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwEJqCJIiTBcj90YNKehv9cJ7ssQFEkJk__mQbluL9U=/FrFB2mtRRuVwsUTRrIqcYFSuOEP4WLtq0XD-N8zWHJw=?fn=Peter&ln=Willis&add1=&add2=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&pc=50023&ci=Ankeny&st=IA&hp=&oc=&ep=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwEJqCJIiTBcj90YNKehv9cJ7ssQFEkJk__mQbluL9U=/FrFB2mtRRuVwsUTRrIqcYFSuOEP4WLtq0XD-N8zWHJw=?fn=Peter&ln=Willis&add1=&add2=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&pc=50023&ci=Ankeny&st=IA&hp=&oc=&ep=) There's simply no reason that the government should be closed over the president's demand for wall funding. Hardworking public servants are going without pay, and it's unacceptable. [**Please join me in calling for an end to the government shutdown.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwEJqCJIiTBcj90YNKehv9cJ7ssQFEkJk__mQbluL9U=/FrFB2mtRRuVwsUTRrIqcYFSuOEP4WLtq0XD-N8zWHJw=?fn=Peter&ln=Willis&add1=&add2=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&pc=50023&ci=Ankeny&st=IA&hp=&oc=&ep=)

Thanks in advance,

Mike
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/OwEJqCJIiTBcj90YNKehv9cJ7ssQFEkJk__mQbluL9U=/cRuCmFUeSO4pEpjOLMjLhuHkuEhhuHR4qeV7aWqAGQg=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_WL_190104_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_
---

---
Mike Thompson for Congress
PO Box 10541
Napa CA 94581 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](http://mikethompsonforcongress.ngpvanhost.com/unsubscribe?mmid=OwEJqCJIiTBcj90YNKehv9cJ7ssQFEkJk__mQbluL9U=&tiid=MPuP8nOgVpnjj1kasNs0Nmk_UYvVagpCYn8W6vj497E=).

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday - January 4, 2019
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| |
#
## **January 4, 2019**
Happy New Year! We are excited for all 2019 has to offer. If your goal is to run for office or volunteer with the campaigns - we have you covered. Visit [indems.org/join](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061733/31319223/369627609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) to get updates on how you can stay connected with the Party. **-Legislative Session-** **** On Thursday, the 2019 legislative session began. Hoosier Democrats have already begun drafting and submitting bills on issues such as protecting health care, raising teacher pay, decriminalizing the possession of marijuana, and more. Follow the links to read the [House](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061734/31319224/-2045381594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) and [Senate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061735/31319225/472771120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) Democratic Caucus' 2019 legislative agendas. **-116th Congress-** **** We're proud to see Representative André Carson and Representative Pete Visclosky sworn in to the 116th Congress this week. They will continue fighting for Hoosier families and bringing leadership and integrity to the House floor. **-More Women-** **** Both the U.S. Congress and Indiana General Assembly are in session and have seen historic gains in the number of women lawmakers serving. Women legislators make up more than half the Indiana House Democratic Caucus, a first in our state's history. In Washington, over 100 women were sworn in. All of these gains were made possible because of your support and vote. **-Government Shutdown-** **** The Trump orchestrated government shutdown reaches 14 days, the fourth longest in U.S. history. While 800,000 federal workers are struggling without their paychecks, Vice President Mike Pence and Trump senior-level appointees are poised to receive $10,000 in annual raises. Read more about this issue [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061736/31319226/933642097?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=&noredirect=on&utm_term=.e799f0cdef4d). **-Candidate Training January 12-** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061737/31319227/-844253659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) We're excited to announce that our Municipal Candidate Training on January 12 has reached capacity. The next generation of Hoosier Democrats are ready to learn the ropes and our partners at the National Democratic Training Committee will help them get started. If you are still interested in attending the training, please email Brittany Solis at bsolis@indems.org to join our waitlist. Additional event details are [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061738/31319228/-844253659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=). **-In the news this week-** Congressman Pete Visclosky announced his [2019 Townhall Schedule](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061739/31319229/-650440203?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) to hear the concerns of District 1 residents and represent their interests in Washington. Mayor Joe Hogsett is initiating a way to [provide training and job opportunities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061740/31319230/-1426010252?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) for those reentering the workforce in 2019. On Wednesday, [State Senator JD Ford held his first townhall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061741/31319231/781076236?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) over Facebook LIVE to answer questions from Senate District 29 residents. Indiana Democratic Party Chair John Zody expressed condolences to the family and constituents of [former State Representative Bill Cochran, who passed away this week](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061742/31319232/1062277541?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=). **-Save the Date-** January 9**First day to file a declaration of candidacy** January 12 [**Municipal Candidate Training**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061743/31319233/-844253659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg=) For additional Democratic events in Indiana, please _[**click here**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/4061744/31319234/-923445962?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZWJkNjllZS02NzEwLWU5MTEtOWYyYS0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cURWTdIPSSeY4rDHqRAAdylI-1a6cNr82SY3bXj4tAg= "http://www.indems.org/events/")_. |
---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Our Exclusive 2018 Stakeholder Report
body:
As an important stakeholder of your Indiana Republican Party, in 2018 you helped make an investment of your time, talent or treasure into our party... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/christmas-came-early-467925?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **_Our Exclusive Stakeholder Report_** Hoosier Republicans,

As an important stakeholder of your Indiana Republican Party, in 2018 you helped make an investment of your time, talent or treasure into our party. And it paid off big time, helping us meet four large goals that will continue to make a difference in our state for generations.

We've [prepared a report](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=062b259650&e=1acd9bb3d6) detailing it all -- including:
* Details of our unprecedented voter contact effort last year (2.5 million contacts)
* Record-breaking cash-on-hand of $5.745 million combined between the Indiana Republican Party, Eric Holcomb for Indiana and Friends of Suzanne Crouch
* A Party Line newsletter that's gone out _every single Friday in 2018 _
* The largest ever Congress of Counties training event
* The second-ever Indiana Republican State Convention outside the state's capital city
* And so much more

[Click this link](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=524e8bd18c&e=1acd9bb3d6) or the cover page below, and read the full report.

Thank you for all of your help in 2018 -- we couldn't have done it without you. I know that together, we'll make this year even greater!

Thanks!
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
[\--> Read the 2018 Year-End Stakeholder Report Here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2222effbda&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cdd1f53076&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
---

clean_body: As an important stakeholder of your Indiana Republican Party, in 2018 you helped make an investment of your time, talent or treasure into our party... | | | | | | Our Exclusive Stakeholder Report Hoosier Republicans, As an important stakeholder of your Indiana Republican Party, in 2018 you helped make an investment of your time, talent or treasure into our party. And it paid off big time, helping us meet four large goals that will continue to make a difference in our state for generations. We've detailing it all -- including: Details of our unprecedented voter contact effort last year (2.5 million contacts) Record-breaking cash-on-hand of $5.745 million combined between the Indiana Republican Party, Eric Holcomb for Indiana and Friends of Suzanne Crouch A Party Line newsletter that's gone out every single Friday in 2018 The largest ever Congress of Counties training event The second-ever Indiana Republican State Convention outside the state's capital city And so much more or the cover page below, and read the full report. Thank you for all of your help in 2018 -- we couldn't have done it without you. I know that together, we'll make this year even greater! Thanks! Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@indiana.gop | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc. 101 W. Ohio St., Suite 2200 Indianapolis, IN 46204 * USA

name: =?utf-8?Q?One=20Minnesota=20Inaugural=20Committee?=
subject: Inaugural Celebration in Duluth - Join Us?
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends,

Please join our new Governor Tim Walz and Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan in Duluth for a celebration this coming Thursday, January 10th. It is free and open to the public, but tickets are required.** [Click here to reserve your free ticket.](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=a83a88a68c&e=b70d12d84a)**

This special evening will feature light refreshments and music by The Crunchy Bunch
**Duluth One Minnesota Inaugural Celebration**

**Thursday, January 10, 2019**
5:00 pm - 7:30 pm

**Kirby Student Center Lounge**
University of Minnesota Duluth
1120 Kirby Dr
Duluth, MN 55812
Please email any questions to events@walz2019.org.

[If you haven't already, reserve your ticket right now!](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=bb466e8345&e=b70d12d84a)

Hope to see you on the 10th!

One Minnesota Inaugural Committee

---
| | |
---
| One Minnesota Inaugural Committee is a Minnesota nonprofit corporation registered with the Internal Revenue Service as a political organization under Section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to the One Minnesota Inaugural Committee are not tax deductible. Contact: [events@walz2019.org](mailto:events@walz2019.org) One Minnesota Inaugural Committee, 620 Wesley Commons Drive, Unit 28, Golden Valley, MN 55427

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=88a0d92b4b&e=b70d12d84a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=88a0d92b4b&e=b70d12d84a&c=09c8bfc74c).

---

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Launching our National Medicare for All Campaign!
body:
Local groups across the country are teaming up with National Nurses United to host barnstorms
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91d2/3201489321/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
Today, this new Congress - filled with a record-breaking number of women, people of color, and LGBTQ representatives - is getting to work, bringing us one step closer to the first-ever hearings on Medicare for All legislation.
[**Will you join our nationwide campaign to pass Medicare for All in Congress? Make a $5 donation to support our grassroots organizing efforts.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91dd/3201489321/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em190104-full&noskip=true")
Local groups across the country are teaming up with National Nurses United to host barnstorms starting this February to train volunteers and organizers on how to advocate for Medicare for All in their communities.
Since 2016, Medicare for All has been at the top of our people's platform. It is tremendous that Congresswomen like Pramila Jayapal, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Deb Haaland, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and Ayanna Pressley are not shying away from pushing the progressive issues that we have been championing.
**[We're hitting the ground running to bring Medicare for All up for a vote in the House. Chip in whatever you can afford and help us make health care a right!](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91dd/3201489321/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em190104-full&noskip=true")**
Your support provides a voice to the millions of Americans who support Medicare for All. Thank you for creating a healthier and safer world for all of us.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91dd/3201489321/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-healthcare?refcode=em190104-full&noskip=true")**
**[P.S. You can join the action directly in your community by hosting or attending a Medicare for All Barnstorm! Click here to learn more about how to get directly involved.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91dc/3201489321/VEsD/ "https://medicare4all.org/host-barnstorm-feb2019/?source=em190104-ourrev")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91df/3201489321/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91de/3201489321/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91d9/3201489321/VEsO/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a6b8/bed43eb/8499bcc4/75fb91d8/3201489321/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

"" Local groups across the country are teaming up with National Nurses United to host barnstorms starting this February to train volunteers and organizers on how to advocate for Medicare for All in their communities. Since 2016, Medicare for All has been at the top of our people's platform. name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: With your help, EMILY's List will continue to lead the charge
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca046/24c69fd9/2fdad3309/18b0b653/2173312151/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact&source=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact")
---

Peter,

I'm so proud to be your Speaker of the House and to get to work for the people.

We couldn't have accomplished our goals without the help of EMILY's List. They came through -- helping us flip an astonishing 24 seats, one more than the 23 we needed to take back the House -- and that's because of supporters like you.

**Thank you, Peter. Our work is not done. We need you. Can you step up again?**

**[Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women this year and in years to come.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca046/24c69fd9/2fdad3309/18b0b64c/2173312151/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20190103_email_JanElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+more+prochoice+De&utm_campaign=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact&source=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact")**

I know women will continue to lead the fight during this dangerous Administration.

I'm part of a strong team that will work tirelessly to protect reproductive rights, health care, civil rights, labor protections, and so much more. But we need to continue to build that defense by electing even more women like the ones you helped elect this year.

That means there's still work to be done.

This community's unwavering support of its candidates made it possible to take back the House. We'll need that same support behind all of the women we want to elect in 2019 and 2020.

Are you ready to get to work, Peter?

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women in 2019, 2020, and beyond:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women-At-Every-Level](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca046/24c69fd9/2fdad3309/18b0b64d/2173312151/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20190103_email_JanElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomenAtEver&utm_campaign=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact&source=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact")**

Thank you,

Nancy Pelosi
Speaker of the House

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca046/24c69fd9/2fdad3309/18b0b64e/2173312151/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20190103_email_JanElectWomen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact&source=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca046/24c69fd9/2fdad3309/18b0b64f/2173312151/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact&source=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca046/24c69fd9/2fdad3309/18b0b648/2173312151/VEsA/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact&source=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118ca046/24c69fd9/2fdad3309/18b0b649/2173312151/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact&source=WREFE103N_digital_email_20190104_Pelosi_inact"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.
